The Article Title

An opening paragraph with italic text, bold text, inline code.Sample() and a link that is unwrapped. It has enough words to demonstrate word wrapping at the golden test width without breaking anything.

The price was $99 and is now $79. Energy is E = mc2, water is H2O, and this footnote survives verbatim[1].

Lists

  • first item
  • second item with enough trailing words to force the renderer to wrap this entry onto a continuation line
  • parent item
    • nested item
    • another nested item
      • deeply nested
  1. step one
  2. step two
  3. step three
  4. step four
  5. step five
  6. step six
  7. step seven
  8. step eight
  9. step nine
  10. step ten

Hard breaks

Affected Versions:
* US_FH1201V1.0BR_V1.2.0.14(408)_EN_TD
* US_W15EV1.0br_V15.11.0.5(1068_1567_841)_EN_TDE
* US_AC10V1.0re_V15.03.06.46_multi_TDE01

A line above a double break

and the line below it.

Code

func main() {
	fmt.Println("hello")
}

Quotes

A quoted paragraph with emphasis inside of it.

A second quoted paragraph.

Media

A paragraph with an inline image in the middle of it.
